description.value: Aura strong (no school); CL 17th; Weight 5 lbs. Price varies by specific type: Lesser echoing metamagic rod 14,000 gp Echoing metamagic rod 54,000 gp Greater echoing metamagic rod 121,500 gp DESCRIPTION The wielder can cast up to three spells per day that can be cast an additional time that day as if using the Echoing Spell feat. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Rod, Echoing Spell Cost varies by specific type: Lesser echoing metamagic rod 7,000 gp Echoing metamagic rod 27,000 gp Greater echoing metamagic rod 60,750 gp
